message:
chore: update beads issue tracker and add bd-2yqp6 bead artifacts + updated smoke lane results

Update .beads/issues.jsonl with current bead state for the bd-2yqp6
track (version contract, parity score contract, oracle preflight doctor,
differential metadata schema, artifact hash integrity, behavioral quirks,
release threshold policy).

Add deterministic artifact outputs for 7 new beads:
- bd-2yqp6.1.3: sqlite version contract validation artifacts
- bd-2yqp6.1.4: parity score contract validation artifacts
- bd-2yqp6.2.5: oracle preflight doctor reports (JSON + human-readable)
- bd-2yqp6.2.7: differential metadata schema validation artifacts
- bd-2yqp6.2.9: artifact hash integrity ratchet baselines and reports
- bd-2yqp6.3.4: behavioral quirks corpus artifacts + minimal repros
- bd-2yqp6.7.1: release threshold policy validation artifacts

Update differential-ci smoke lane results to reflect expanded corpus
(88 total cases, 62 pass, 26 divergences from new conformance fixtures).
Add doctor pre-flight artifacts to smoke output directory.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

+  "ops": [
+    { "op": "open", "path": ":memory:" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "CREATE TABLE t(a INTEGER, b TEXT)" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO t VALUES(1, 'x')" },
+    { "op": "query", "sql": "SELECT a, b FROM t ORDER BY a", "expect": { "columns": ["a", "b"], "rows": [["1", "x"]], "ordered": true } }
+  ],
+  "fsqlite_modes": ["compatibility"]
+}
